pages.name: Landing Page
pages.purpose: Convert visitors into leads through a compelling, responsive design with key sections and interactive elements

files_to_create.purpose: main landing page with all components
responsive styles and animations for all sections
interactive features including exit-intent popup, sticky nav, and form logic

tasks: Create HTML structure for all landing page sections including sticky navigation, hero, features grid, social proof, pricing table, FAQ, lead form, exit popup, and trust badges
Develop responsive CSS with animations for interactive elements and section styling
Implement JavaScript for sticky navigation, smooth scroll with offset, and exit-intent popup functionality
Build progressive profiling logic for lead capture form
Integrate trust badges and social proof images into the page
Test accessibility and mobile responsiveness across devices
Set up A/B testing hooks for future experiments
